creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: linimon->gabor

Here are the failures that I have not yet seen on other build environments 
(amd64-10-exp-previous on pointyhat-west; amd64-* on pointyhat).  I do not 
think that any of these have to do with bsdsort but another set of eyes 
would be advisable before we conclude that. 

Note 1: the "runaway process" failures might go away on a -restart.  If you 
want, I can try that. 

Note 2: many of the rest have a common failure "error: cannot convert 
'gzFile_s**' to 'gzFile_s*'".  This may simply be a new regression in 
-current not yet documented in http://wiki.freebsd.org/PortsFailingOnCurrent 
or its subsidiary pages. 

overall build: 

http://pointyhat-west.isc.freebsd.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/e.10-exp.20120623064842.pointyhat-west/unalz-0.65.log
